arguments.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Prompt Database Manager v2 - Support Prompt Packs
"""

import os
import sys
import json
import re
import yaml
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

# Constants
PROMPTS_V2_DIR = Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "workspace" / "prompts_v2"
CATEGORY_FILES = {
    "Landing Page & Website": "Landing_Page_And_Website.md",
    "Marketing & Ads": "Marketing_And_Ads.md",
    "Content & Social Media": "Content_And_Social_Media.md",
    "Email & CRM": "Email_And_CRM.md",
    "Business & Offer / Tripwire": "Business_And_Offer_Tripwire.md",
    "Coding & Automation": "Coding_And_Automation.md"
}

# Category keywords for auto-classification
CATEGORY_KEYWORDS = {
    "Landing Page & Website": ["landing page", "hero", "section", "wireframe", "layout", "above the fold", "website", "webpage", "conversion", "cta"],
    "Marketing & Ads": ["ads", "iklan", "campaign", "creative", "conversion", "funnel", "marketing", "digital marketing", "social media ads", "advertising"],
    "Content & Social Media": ["caption", "content", "reels", "tiktok", "thread", "script", "hook", "social media", "blog", "article", "copywriting"],
    "Email & CRM": ["email", "newsletter", "sequence", "crm", "follow up", "mail", "mailing", "autoresponder", "drip"],
    "Business & Offer / Tripwire": ["offer", "tripwire", "pricing", "productized", "client", "business", "freelance", "proposal", "invoice", "deal"],
    "Coding & Automation": ["code", "api", "script", "python", "deploy", "automation", "javascript", "react", "backend", "frontend", "debug"]
}

def ensure_structure():
    """Create prompts_v2 directory and category files if not exist"""
    PROMPTS_V2_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    for category, filename in CATEGORY_FILES.items():
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
        if not file_path.exists():
            with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"# {category} Prompts\n\n")
    
    # Set permissions
    os.chmod(PROMPTS_V2_DIR, 0o755)
    for file_path in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        os.chmod(file_path, 0o644)
    
    return True

def slugify(title: str) -> str:
    """Convert title to URL-friendly slug"""
    # Lowercase
    slug = title.lower()
    # Replace spaces and special chars with hyphens
    slug = re.sub(r'[^\w\s-]', '', slug)
    slug = re.sub(r'[-\s]+', '-', slug)
    # Remove leading/trailing hyphens
    slug = slug.strip('-')
    # Limit length
    if len(slug) > 50:
        slug = slug[:50]
    return slug

def remove_prompt_by_slug(slug: str) -> bool:
    """Remove all YAML blocks with given slug from all category files"""
    removed = False
    slug = slug.lower()
    
    for filename in CATEGORY_FILES.values():
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
        if not file_path.exists():
            continue
        
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Split by YAML separators
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        new_blocks = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip():
                new_blocks.append(block)
                continue
            
            # Check if block contains the slug
            if f"slug: {slug}" in block.lower() or f"slug: {slug}\n" in block.lower():
                removed = True
                continue  # Skip this block (remove it)
            
            new_blocks.append(block)
        
        # Reconstruct content
        new_content = "---\n".join(new_blocks)
        with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(new_content)
    
    return removed

def auto_classify(prompt_text: str, title: str = "") -> str:
    """Auto-classify prompt into category based on keywords"""
    combined_text = f"{title} {prompt_text}".lower()
    scores = {}
    
    for category, keywords in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.items():
        score = sum(1 for keyword in keywords if keyword in combined_text)
        scores[category] = score
    
    # Get category with highest score
    max_score = max(scores.values())
    if max_score == 0:
        return "Marketing & Ads"  # Default
    
    # Get all categories with max score
    top_categories = [cat for cat, score in scores.items() if score == max_score]
    
    # If tie, use priority order
    priority_order = [
        "Landing Page & Website",
        "Marketing & Ads", 
        "Content & Social Media",
        "Email & CRM",
        "Business & Offer / Tripwire",
        "Coding & Automation"
    ]
    
    for cat in priority_order:
        if cat in top_categories:
            return cat
    
    return top_categories[0]

def save_prompt(title: str, prompt_text: str, hint_category: str = None, pack_slug: str = None) -> dict:
    """Save single prompt to database"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    # Generate slug
    slug = slugify(title)
    
    # Remove existing prompt with same slug
    remove_prompt_by_slug(slug)
    
    # Determine category
    if hint_category and hint_category in CATEGORY_FILES:
        category = hint_category
    else:
        category = auto_classify(prompt_text, title)
    
    # Build YAML entry
    entry = {
        "title": title,
        "slug": slug,
        "category": category,
        "sub_category": "General",
        "pack_slug": pack_slug if pack_slug else "",
        "tags": ["general"],
        "keywords": [],
        "level": "starter",
        "commercial": "public",
        "created_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),
        "prompt": prompt_text,
        "notes": ""
    }
    
    # Extract keywords from title and prompt
    text_for_keywords = f"{title} {prompt_text}".lower()
    for cat, keywords in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.items():
        for keyword in keywords:
            if keyword in text_for_keywords and keyword not in entry["keywords"]:
                entry["keywords"].append(keyword)
    
    # Limit keywords
    entry["keywords"] = entry["keywords"][:10]
    
    # Append to category file
    filename = CATEGORY_FILES[category]
    file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
    
    yaml_content = yaml.dump(entry, allow_unicode=True, sort_keys=False)
    entry_block = f"---\n{yaml_content}---\n\n"
    
    with open(file_path, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(entry_block)
    
    return {
        "slug": slug,
        "title": title,
        "category": category,
        "pack_slug": pack_slug
    }

def parse_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> dict:
    """Parse raw text containing prompt pack"""
    lines = raw_text.strip().split('\n')
    
    # First non-empty line is pack title
    pack_title = ""
    for line in lines:
        if line.strip():
            pack_title = line.strip()
            break
    
    # Parse sub-prompts
    sub_prompts = []
    current_title = ""
    current_content = []
    in_sub_prompt = False
    
    for line in lines:
        line = line.rstrip()
        
        # Check for numbered sub-prompt (1), 2), 1., 2., etc.)
        match = re.match(r'^(\d+)[\)\.]\s*(.+)$', line.strip())
        if match:
            # Save previous sub-prompt if exists
            if current_title and current_content:
                sub_prompts.append({
                    "title": current_title,
                    "prompt": "\n".join(current_content).strip()
                })
            
            # Start new sub-prompt
            current_title = match.group(2).strip()
            current_content = []
            in_sub_prompt = True
        elif in_sub_prompt and line.strip():
            current_content.append(line)
        elif not in_sub_prompt and line.strip() and line != pack_title:
            # Additional content for pack title
            pass
    
    # Save last sub-prompt
    if current_title and current_content:
        sub_prompts.append({
            "title": current_title,
            "prompt": "\n".join(current_content).strip()
        })
    
    # Generate pack slug
    pack_slug = slugify(pack_title)
    
    return {
        "pack_title": pack_title,
        "pack_slug": pack_slug,
        "sub_prompts": sub_prompts
    }

def save_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> list:
    """Save prompt pack to database"""
    pack_data = parse_prompt_pack(raw_text)
    
    if not pack_data["sub_prompts"]:
        return []
    
    # Determine pack category based on all sub-prompts
    all_text = pack_data["pack_title"] + " " + " ".join(
        [sp["title"] + " " + sp["prompt"] for sp in pack_data["sub_prompts"]]
    )
    pack_category = auto_classify(all_text)
    
    # Save each sub-prompt
    saved_prompts = []
    for i, sub_prompt in enumerate(pack_data["sub_prompts"]):
        # Create final title
        final_title = f"{pack_data['pack_title']} – {sub_prompt['title']}"
        
        # Generate slug for sub-prompt
        sub_slug = slugify(f"{pack_data['pack_slug']}-{sub_prompt['title']}")
        
        # Save prompt
        result = save_prompt(
            title=final_title,
            prompt_text=sub_prompt["prompt"],
            hint_category=pack_category,
            pack_slug=pack_data["pack_slug"]
        )
        
        saved_prompts.append({
            "slug": result["slug"],
            "title": sub_prompt["title"],
            "pack_slug": pack_data["pack_slug"]
        })
    
    return saved_prompts

def search_packs_by_topic(query: str) -> list:
    """Search for packs by topic"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    query_lower = query.lower()
    pack_results = {}
    
    # Scan all category files
    for filename in CATEGORY_FILES.values():
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
        if not file_path.exists():
            continue
        
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Parse YAML blocks
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip() or block.strip().startswith("#"):
                continue
            
            try:
                data = yaml.safe_load(block)
                if not data or "slug" not in data:
                    continue
                
                # Check if matches query
                search_text = (
                    (data.get("title", "") + " " + 
                     data.get("prompt", "") + " " +
                     " ".join(data.get("tags", [])) + " " +
                     " ".join(data.get("keywords", [])) + " " +
                     data.get("category", "")).lower()
                )
                
                if query_lower in search_text:
                    pack_slug = data.get("pack_slug", "")
                    if not pack_slug:
                        continue
                    
                    if pack_slug not in pack_results:
                        pack_results[pack_slug] = {
                            "pack_slug": pack_slug,
                            "pack_title": data.get("title", "").split(" – ")[0] if " – " in data.get("title", "") else data.get("title", ""),
                            "category": data.get("category", ""),
                            "count": 0,
                            "sample_titles": []
                        }
                    
                    pack_results[pack_slug]["count"] += 1
                    short_title = data.get("title", "").split(" – ")[-1] if " – " in data.get("title", "") else data.get("title", "")
                    if short_title and short_title not in pack_results[pack_slug]["sample_titles"]:
                        pack_results[pack_slug]["sample_titles"].append(short_title)
                        
            except yaml.YAMLError:
                continue
    
    # Convert to list and sort by count
    results = list(pack_results.values())
    results.sort(key=lambda x: x["count"], reverse=True)
    
    return results

def list_all() -> dict:
    """List all prompts in database"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    result = {"total": 0, "by_category": {}}
    
    for category, filename in CATEGORY_FILES.items():
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
        if not file_path.exists():
            result["by_category"][category] = []
            continue
        
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        category_prompts = []
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip() or block.strip().startswith("#"):
                continue
            
            try:
                data = yaml.safe_load(block)
                if data and "slug" in data:
                    category_prompts.append({
                        "slug": data.get("slug", ""),
                        "title": data.get("title", ""),
                        "level": data.get("level", "starter")
                    })
            except yaml.YAMLError:
                continue
        
        result["by_category"][category] = category_prompts
        result["total"] += len(category_prompts)
    
    return result

def format_prompt_packs(query: str, packs: list) -> str:
    """Format packs for display"""
    if not packs:
        return f"❌ Tidak ada paket prompt untuk '{query}'"
    
    output = [f"🎯 Paket prompt {query} ({len(packs)}):"]
    
    for i, pack in enumerate(packs[:8]):  # Max 8 packs
        sample = ", ".join(pack["sample_titles"][:3])
        output.append(f"{i+1}) {pack['pack_slug']} – {pack['count']} prompt ({sample})")
    
    if len(packs) > 8:
        output.append(f"... dan {len(packs) - 8} paket lainnya")
    
    output.append("Ketik: lihat paket: [pack_slug] untuk lihat isi, atau pakai: [slug] untuk pakai satu prompt.")
    
    return "\n".join(output)

def format_list_overview(data: dict, category: str = None) -> str:
    """Format list overview for display"""
    if category:
        # List specific category
        if category not in data["by_category"]:
            return f"❌ Kategori '{category}' tidak ditemukan"
        
        prompts = data["by_category"][category]
        if not prompts:
            return f"📂 Kategori {category}: 0 prompt"
        
        output = [f"📂 {category} ({len(prompts)} prompt):"]
        for i, prompt in enumerate(prompts[:10]):  # Max 10 items
            short_title = prompt["title"][:40] + "..." if len(prompt["title"]) > 40 else prompt["title"]
            output.append(f"{i+1}) {prompt['slug']} – {short_title}")
        
        if len(prompts) > 10:
            output.append(f"... dan {len(prompts) - 10} prompt lainnya")
        
        return "\n".join(output)
    else:
        # List all categories
        output = [f"📊 Database Prompt: {data['total']} total"]
        
        for cat, prompts in data["by_category"].items():
            if prompts:
                output.append(f"• {cat}: {len(prompts)} prompt")
        
        output.append("Ketik: List [kategori] untuk lihat detail")
        return "\n".join(output)

def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print(json.dumps({"error": "Usage: prompt_db_v2.py <command> [args]"}))
        sys.exit(1)
    
    command = sys.argv[1].lower()
    
    try:
        if command == "save":
            # Save single prompt: save "<title>" "<prompt_text>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 4:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing title or prompt text"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            title = sys.argv[2]
            prompt_text = " ".join(sys.argv[3:])
            
            result = save_prompt(title, prompt_text)
            print(json.dumps({"success": True, **result}))
        
        elif command == "save-pack":
            # Save prompt pack: save-pack "<raw_text>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 3:

def ensure_structure():
    """Create prompts_v2 directory and category files if not exist"""
    PROMPTS_V2_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    for category, filename in CATEGORY_FILES.items():
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
        if not file_path.exists():
            with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"# {category} Prompts\n\n")
    
    # Set permissions
    os.chmod(PROMPTS_V2_DIR, 0o755)
    for file_path in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        os.chmod(file_path, 0o644)
    
    return True

def slugify(title: str) -> str:
    """Convert title to URL-friendly slug"""
    # Lowercase
    slug = title.lower()
    # Replace spaces and special chars with hyphens
    slug = re.sub(r'[^\w\s-]', '', slug)
    slug = re.sub(r'[-\s]+', '-', slug)
    # Remove leading/trailing hyphens
    slug = slug.strip('-')
    # Limit length
    if len(slug) > 50:
        slug = slug[:50]
    return slug

def remove_prompt_by_slug(slug: str) -> bool:
    """Remove all YAML blocks with given slug from all category files"""
    removed = False
    slug = slug.lower()
    
    for filename in CATEGORY_FILES.values():
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
        if not file_path.exists():
            continue
        
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Split by YAML separators
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        new_blocks = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip():
                new_blocks.append(block)
                continue
            
            # Check if block contains the slug
            if f"slug: {slug}" in block.lower() or f"slug: {slug}\n" in block.lower():
                removed = True
                continue  # Skip this block (remove it)
            
            new_blocks.append(block)
        
        # Reconstruct content
        new_content = "---\n".join(new_blocks)
        with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(new_content)
    
    return removed

    """Auto-classify prompt into category based on keywords"""
    combined_text = f"{title} {prompt_text}".lower()
    scores = {}
    
    for category, keywords in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.items():
        score = sum(1 for keyword in keywords if keyword in combined_text)
        scores[category] = score
    
    # Get category with highest score
    max_score = max(scores.values())
    if max_score == 0:
        return "Marketing & Ads"  # Default
    
    # Get all categories with max score

    priority_order = [
        "Landing Page & Website",

        "Content & Social Media",
        "Email & CRM",
        "Business & Offer / Tripwire",
        "Coding & Automation"
    ]
    
    for cat in priority_order:
        if cat in top_categories:
            return cat
    
    return top_categories[0]

        result["by_category"][category] = category_prompts
        result["total"] += len(category_prompts)
    
    return result

def format_prompt_packs(query: str, packs: list) -> str:
    """Format packs for display"""
    if not packs:
        return f"❌ Tidak ada paket prompt untuk '{query}'"
    
    output = [f"🎯 Paket prompt {query} ({len(packs)}):"]
    
    for i, pack in enumerate(packs[:8]):  # Max 8 packs
        sample = ", ".join(pack["sample_titles"][:3])
        output.append(f"{i+1}) {pack['pack_slug']} – {pack['count']} prompt ({sample})")
    
    if len(packs) > 8:
        output.append(f"... dan {len(packs) - 8} paket lainnya")
    
    output.append("Ketik: lihat paket: [pack_slug] untuk lihat isi, atau pakai: [slug] untuk pakai satu prompt.")
    
    return "\n".join(output)

def format_list_overview(data: dict, category: str = None) -> str:
    """Format list overview for display"""
    if category:
        # List specific category
        if category not in data["by_category"]:
            return f"❌ Kategori '{category}' tidak ditemukan"
        
        prompts = data["by_category"][category]
        if not prompts:
            return f"📂 Kategori {category}: 0 prompt"
        
        output = [f"📂 {category} ({len(prompts)} prompt):"]
        for i, prompt in enumerate(prompts[:10]):  # Max 10 items
            short_title = prompt["title"][:40] + "..." if len(prompt["title"]) > 40 else prompt["title"]
            output.append(f"{i+1}) {prompt['slug']} – {short_title}")
        
        if len(prompts) > 10:
            output.append(f"... dan {len(prompts) - 10} prompt lainnya")
        
        return "\n".join(output)
    else:
        # List all categories
        output = [f"📊 Database Prompt: {data['total']} total"]
        
        for cat, prompts in data["by_category"].items():
            if prompts:
                output.append(f"• {cat}: {len(prompts)} prompt")
        
        output.append("Ketik: List [kategori] untuk lihat detail")
        return "\n".join(output)

def main():

        print(json.dumps({"error": "Usage: prompt_db_v2.py <command> [args]"}))
        sys.exit(1)
    
    command = sys.argv[1].lower()

            print(json.dumps({"success": True, **result}))
        
        elif command == "save-pack":

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Prompt Database Manager v2 - Support Prompt Packs
"""

import os
import sys
import json
import re
import yaml
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

# Constants
PROMPTS_V2_DIR = Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "workspace" / "prompts_v2"
CATEGORY_FILES = {
    "Landing Page & Website": "Landing_Page_And_Website.md",
    "Marketing & Ads": "Marketing_And_Ads.md",
    "Content & Social Media": "Content_And_Social_Media.md",
    "Email & CRM": "Email_And_CRM.md",
    "Business & Offer / Tripwire": "Business_And_Offer_Tripwire.md",
    "Coding & Automation": "Coding_And_Automation.md"
}

# Category keywords for auto-classification
CATEGORY_KEYWORDS = {
    "Landing Page & Website": ["landing page", "hero", "section", "wireframe", "layout", "above the fold", "website", "web page", "conversion", "cta"],
    "Marketing & Ads": ["ads", "iklan", "campaign", "creative", "conversion", "funnel", "marketing", "digital marketing", "advertising", "promotion"],
    "Content & Social Media": ["caption", "content", "reels", "tiktok", "thread", "script", "hook", "social media", "post", "copywriting"],
    "Email & CRM": ["email", "newsletter", "sequence", "crm", "follow up", "mail", "autoresponder", "drip campaign"],
    "Business & Offer / Tripwire": ["offer", "tripwire", "pricing", "productized", "client", "business", "sales", "proposal", "deal"],
    "Coding & Automation": ["code", "api", "script", "python", "deploy", "automation", "programming", "developer", "backend", "frontend"]
}

def ensure_structure():
    """Create prompts_v2 directory and category files if they don't exist"""
    PROMPTS_V2_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    for category, filename in CATEGORY_FILES.items():
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
        if not file_path.exists():
            with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"# {category} Prompts\n\n")
    
    # Set permissions
    for file_path in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        os.chmod(file_path, 0o644)
    
    return True

def slugify(title: str) -> str:
    """Convert title to URL-friendly slug"""
    # Convert to lowercase
    slug = title.lower()
    # Replace spaces and special characters with hyphens
    slug = re.sub(r'[^\w\s-]', '', slug)
    slug = re.sub(r'[\s_-]+', '-', slug)
    slug = re.sub(r'^-+|-+$', '', slug)
    # Remove emojis and special symbols
    slug = re.sub(r'[^\w-]', '', slug)
    return slug

def remove_prompt_by_slug(slug: str) -> bool:
    """Remove all YAML blocks with given slug from all category files"""
    removed = False
    slug = slug.lower()
    
    for filename in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(filename, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Split by YAML block separator
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        new_blocks = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip():
                new_blocks.append(block)
                continue
            
            # Check if this block contains the slug
            if f"slug: {slug}" in block.lower() or f'slug: "{slug}"' in block.lower():
                removed = True
                continue  # Skip this block (remove it)
            
            new_blocks.append(block)
        
        if removed:
            # Reconstruct content
            new_content = "---\n".join(new_blocks)
            with open(filename, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(new_content)
    
    return removed

def auto_classify(prompt_text: str, title: str = "") -> str:
    """Auto-classify prompt into category based on keywords"""
    combined_text = f"{title} {prompt_text}".lower()
    scores = {}
    
    for category, keywords in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.items():
        score = sum(1 for keyword in keywords if keyword in combined_text)
        scores[category] = score
    
    # Find category with highest score
    max_score = max(scores.values())
    if max_score == 0:
        return "Marketing & Ads"  # Default category
    
    # Get all categories with max score
    top_categories = [cat for cat, score in scores.items() if score == max_score]
    
    # If tie, prefer "Marketing & Ads"
    if "Marketing & Ads" in top_categories:
        return "Marketing & Ads"
    
    return top_categories[0]

def save_prompt(title: str, prompt_text: str, hint_category: str = None, pack_slug: str = None) -> dict:
    """Save a single prompt to database"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    # Generate slug
    prompt_slug = slugify(title)
    
    # Remove existing prompt with same slug
    remove_prompt_by_slug(prompt_slug)
    
    # Determine category
    if hint_category:
        category = hint_category
    else:
        category = auto_classify(prompt_text, title)
    
    # Prepare YAML block
    yaml_block = f"""---
title: {title}
slug: {prompt_slug}
category: {category}
sub_category: General
pack_slug: {pack_slug if pack_slug else ""}
tags: []
keywords: []
level: starter
commercial: public
created_at: {datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")}
prompt: |
  {prompt_text}
notes: |
  No additional notes.
---

"""
    
    # Append to category file
    category_file = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / CATEGORY_FILES[category]
    with open(category_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(yaml_block)
    
    return {
        "slug": prompt_slug,
        "title": title,
        "category": category,
        "pack_slug": pack_slug
    }

def parse_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> dict:
    """Parse raw text containing prompt pack with numbered sub-prompts"""
    lines = raw_text.strip().split('\n')
    
    # First non-empty line is pack title
    pack_title = ""
    for line in lines:
        if line.strip():
            pack_title = line.strip()
            break
    
    # Find all numbered sub-prompts (1), 2), 3) or 1. 2. 3.)
    sub_prompts = []
    current_title = ""
    current_content = []
    in_sub_prompt = False
    
    for line in lines:
        line = line.rstrip()
        
        # Check if line starts with number pattern
        number_match = re.match(r'^(\d+)[).]\s*(.*)', line)
        
        if number_match:
            # Save previous sub-prompt if exists
            if in_sub_prompt and current_title:
                sub_prompts.append({
                    "title": current_title.strip(),
                    "prompt": '\n'.join(current_content).strip()
                })
            
            # Start new sub-prompt
            in_sub_prompt = True
            current_title = number_match.group(2)
            current_content = []
        elif in_sub_prompt:
            # Continue collecting content for current sub-prompt
            current_content.append(line)
    
    # Save the last sub-prompt
    if in_sub_prompt and current_title:
        sub_prompts.append({
            "title": current_title.strip(),
            "prompt": '\n'.join(current_content).strip()
        })
    
    # If no numbered sub-prompts found, treat as single prompt
    if not sub_prompts:
        sub_prompts.append({
            "title": pack_title,
            "prompt": '\n'.join(lines[1:]).strip() if len(lines) > 1 else ""
        })
    
    return {
        "pack_title": pack_title,
        "pack_slug": slugify(pack_title),
        "sub_prompts": sub_prompts
    }

def save_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> list:
    """Parse and save a prompt pack with multiple sub-prompts"""
    pack_data = parse_prompt_pack(raw_text)
    pack_slug = pack_data["pack_slug"]
    
    # Determine pack category based on all sub-prompts
    all_text = pack_data["pack_title"] + " " + " ".join(
        sp["title"] + " " + sp["prompt"] for sp in pack_data["sub_prompts"]
    )
    pack_category = auto_classify(all_text, pack_data["pack_title"])
    
    results = []
    for i, sub_prompt in enumerate(pack_data["sub_prompts"]):
        # Create final title
        if len(pack_data["sub_prompts"]) > 1:
            final_title = f"{pack_data['pack_title']} – {sub_prompt['title']}"
        else:
            final_title = pack_data["pack_title"]
        
        # Generate sub-prompt slug
        sub_slug = slugify(f"{pack_slug}-{sub_prompt['title']}")
        
        # Save the prompt
        result = save_prompt(
            title=final_title,
            prompt_text=sub_prompt["prompt"],
            hint_category=pack_category,
            pack_slug=pack_slug
        )
        result["sub_slug"] = sub_slug
        results.append(result)
    
    return results

def search_packs_by_topic(query: str) -> list:
    """Search for prompt packs by topic"""
    ensure_structure()
    query_lower = query.lower()
    pack_map = {}
    
    # Scan all category files
    for filename in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(filename, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Split by YAML blocks
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip() or block.startswith("#"):
                continue
            
            # Parse YAML block
            try:
                yaml_data = yaml.safe_load(block)
                if not yaml_data:
                    continue
                
                pack_slug = yaml_data.get("pack_slug", "")
                if not pack_slug:
                    continue
                
                # Check if matches query
                title = yaml_data.get("title", "").lower()
                category = yaml_data.get("category", "").lower()
                tags = yaml_data.get("tags", [])
                keywords = yaml_data.get("keywords", [])
                
                matches = (
                    query_lower in title or
                    query_lower in category or
                    any(query_lower in str(tag).lower() for tag in tags) or
                    any(query_lower in str(kw).lower() for kw in keywords)
                )
                
                if matches:
                    if pack_slug not in pack_map:
                        pack_map[pack_slug] = {
                            "pack_slug": pack_slug,
                            "pack_title": yaml_data.get("title", "").split(" – ")[0] if " – " in yaml_data.get("title", "") else yaml_data.get("title", ""),
                            "category": yaml_data.get("category", ""),
                            "count": 0,
                            "sample_titles": []
                        }
                    
                    pack_map[pack_slug]["count"] += 1
                    if len(pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"]) < 3:
                        short_title = yaml_data.get("title", "")[:40]
                        if short_title not in pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"]:
                            pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"].append(short_title)
            except:
                continue
    
    return list(pack_map.values())

def format_prompt_packs(query: str, packs: list) -> str:
    """Format prompt packs for display"""
    if not packs:
        return f"❌ Tidak ada paket prompt untuk '{query}'"
    
    lines = [f"🎯 Paket prompt {query} ({len(packs)}):"]
    
    for i, pack in enumerate(packs[:8]):  # Max 8 packs
        sample = ", ".join(pack["sample_titles"][:3])
        lines.append(f"{i+1}) {pack['pack_slug']} – {pack['count']} prompt ({sample})")
    
    if len(packs) > 8:
        lines.append(f"... dan {len(packs) - 8} paket lainnya")
    
    lines.append("")
    lines.append("Ketik: lihat paket: [pack_slug] untuk lihat isi, atau pakai: [slug] untuk pakai satu prompt.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def list_all() -> dict:
    """List all prompts in database (compatible with v1 format)"""
    ensure_structure()
    result = {"total": 0, "by_category": {}}
    
    # Map v2 categories to v1 categories for compatibility
    category_map = {
        "Landing Page & Website": "DM",
        "Marketing & Ads": "DM", 
        "Content & Social Media": "CC",
        "Email & CRM": "DM",
        "Business & Offer / Tripwire": "BIZ",
        "Coding & Automation": "DEV"
    }
    
    for filename in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(filename, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Get category from filename
        category_name = None
        for cat, cat_file in CATEGORY_FILES.items():
            if cat_file == filename.name:
                category_name = cat
                break
        
        if not category_name:
            continue
        
        # Parse YAML blocks
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        prompts = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip() or block.startswith("#"):
                continue
            
            try:
                yaml_data = yaml.safe_load(block)
                if not yaml_data:
                    continue
                
                # Map to v1 format
                v1_category = category_map.get(category_name, "PE")
                if v1_category not in result["by_category"]:
                    result["by_category"][v1_category] = []
                
                result["by_category"][v1_category].append({
                    "id": yaml_data.get("slug", "").upper().replace("-", "-"),
                    "title": yaml_data.get("title", ""),
                    "level": "⭐ Starter"
                })
                result["total"] += 1
            except:
                continue
    
    return result

def format_list_overview(data: dict) -> str:
    """Format list overview for display"""
    lines = [f"📊 Database Prompt: {data['total']} total"]
    
    for category, prompts in data["by_category"].items():
        lines.append(f"{category}: {len(prompts)} prompt")
        # Show first 3 prompts if any
        for i, prompt in enumerate(prompts[:3]):
            short_title = prompt["title"][:40] + "..." if len(prompt["title"]) > 40 else prompt["title"]
            lines.append(f"  {i+1}. {prompt['id']} – {short_title}")
        if len(prompts) > 3:
            lines.append(f"  ... dan {len(prompts) - 3} lainnya")
        lines.append("")
    
    lines.append("Gunakan: prompt [topik] untuk cari, atau List [kategori] untuk detail.")
    return "\n".join(lines)

def list_category(category_name: str) -> str:
    """List prompts in specific category"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    # Map v1 categories to v2 categories
    reverse_map = {
        "DM": ["Landing Page & Website", "Marketing & Ads", "Email & CRM"],
        "CC": ["Content & Social Media"],
        "BIZ": ["Business & Offer / Tripwire"],
        "DEV": ["Coding & Automation"],
        "PE": [],  # Not directly mapped in v2
        "OPS": []  # Not directly mapped in v2
    }
    
    v2_categories = reverse_map.get(category_name.upper(), [category_name])
    
    lines = [f"📂 Kategori {category_name}:"]
    prompt_count = 0
    
    for v2_cat in v2_categories:
        if v2_cat not in CATEGORY_FILES:
            continue
        
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / CATEGORY_FILES[v2_cat]
        if not file_path.exists():
            continue
        
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        category_prompts = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip() or block.startswith("#"):
                continue
            
            try:
                yaml_data = yaml.safe_load(block)
                if yaml_data:
                    category_prompts.append(yaml_data)
            except:
                continue
        
        if category_prompts:
            lines.append(f"{v2_cat} ({len(category_prompts)}):")
            for i, prompt in enumerate(category_prompts[:10]):  # Max 10 per category

    # Append to category file
    category_file = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / CATEGORY_FILES[category]
    with open(category_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(yaml_block)
    
    return {
        "slug": prompt_slug,
        "title": title,
        "category": category,
        "pack_slug": pack_slug
    }

def parse_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> dict:
    """Parse raw text containing prompt pack with numbered sub-prompts"""
    lines = raw_text.strip().split('\n')
    
    # First non-empty line is pack title
    pack_title = ""
    for line in lines:
        if line.strip():
            pack_title = line.strip()
            break
    
    # Find all numbered sub-prompts (1), 2), 3) or 1. 2. 3.)
    sub_prompts = []
    current_title = ""
    current_content = []
    in_sub_prompt = False
    
    for line in lines:
        line = line.rstrip()
        
        # Check if line starts with number pattern
        number_match = re.match(r'^(\d+)[).]\s*(.*)', line)
        
        if number_match:
            # Save previous sub-prompt if exists
            if in_sub_prompt and current_title:
                sub_prompts.append({
                    "title": current_title.strip(),
                    "prompt": '\n'.join(current_content).strip()
                })
            
            # Start new sub-prompt
            in_sub_prompt = True
            current_title = number_match.group(2)
            current_content = []
        elif in_sub_prompt:
            # Continue collecting content for current sub-prompt
            current_content.append(line)
    
    # Save the last sub-prompt
    if in_sub_prompt and current_title:
        sub_prompts.append({
            "title": current_title.strip(),
            "prompt": '\n'.join(current_content).strip()
        })
    
    # If no numbered sub-prompts found, treat as single prompt
    if not sub_prompts:
        sub_prompts.append({
            "title": pack_title,
            "prompt": '\n'.join(lines[1:]).strip() if len(lines) > 1 else ""
        })
    
    return {
        "pack_title": pack_title,
        "pack_slug": slugify(pack_title),
        "sub_prompts": sub_prompts
    }

def save_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> list:
    """Parse and save a prompt pack with multiple sub-prompts"""
    pack_data = parse_prompt_pack(raw_text)
    pack_slug = pack_data["pack_slug"]
    
    # Determine pack category based on all sub-prompts
    all_text = pack_data["pack_title"] + " " + " ".join(
        sp["title"] + " " + sp["prompt"] for sp in pack_data["sub_prompts"]
    )
    pack_category = auto_classify(all_text, pack_data["pack_title"])
    
    results = []
    for i, sub_prompt in enumerate(pack_data["sub_prompts"]):
        # Create final title
        if len(pack_data["sub_prompts"]) > 1:
            final_title = f"{pack_data['pack_title']} – {sub_prompt['title']}"
        else:
            final_title = pack_data["pack_title"]
        
        # Generate sub-prompt slug
        sub_slug = slugify(f"{pack_slug}-{sub_prompt['title']}")
        
        # Save the prompt
        result = save_prompt(
            title=final_title,
            prompt_text=sub_prompt["prompt"],
            hint_category=pack_category,
            pack_slug=pack_slug
        )
        result["sub_slug"] = sub_slug
        results.append(result)
    
    return results

def search_packs_by_topic(query: str) -> list:
    """Search for prompt packs by topic"""
    ensure_structure()
    query_lower = query.lower()
    pack_map = {}
    
    # Scan all category files
    for filename in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(filename, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Split by YAML blocks
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip() or block.startswith("#"):
                continue
            
            # Parse YAML block
            try:
                yaml_data = yaml.safe_load(block)
                if not yaml_data:
                    continue
                
                pack_slug = yaml_data.get("pack_slug", "")
                if not pack_slug:
                    continue
                
                # Check if matches query
                title = yaml_data.get("title", "").lower()
                category = yaml_data.get("category", "").lower()
                tags = yaml_data.get("tags", [])
                keywords = yaml_data.get("keywords", [])
                
                matches = (
                    query_lower in title or
                    query_lower in category or
                    any(query_lower in str(tag).lower() for tag in tags) or
                    any(query_lower in str(kw).lower() for kw in keywords)
                )
                
                if matches:
                    if pack_slug not in pack_map:
                        pack_map[pack_slug] = {
                            "pack_slug": pack_slug,
                            "pack_title": yaml_data.get("title", "").split(" – ")[0] if " – " in yaml_data.get("title", "") else yaml_data.get("title", ""),
                            "category": yaml_data.get("category", ""),
                            "count": 0,
                            "sample_titles": []
                        }
                    
                    pack_map[pack_slug]["count"] += 1
                    if len(pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"]) < 3:
                        short_title = yaml_data.get("title", "")[:40]
                        if short_title not in pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"]:
                            pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"].append(short_title)
            except:
                continue
    
    return list(pack_map.values())

def format_prompt_packs(query: str, packs: list) -> str:
    """Format prompt packs for display"""
    if not packs:
        return f"❌ Tidak ada paket prompt untuk '{query}'"
    
    lines = [f"🎯 Paket prompt {query} ({len(packs)}):"]
    
    for i, pack in enumerate(packs[:8]):  # Max 8 packs
        sample = ", ".join(pack["sample_titles"][:3])
        lines.append(f"{i+1}) {pack['pack_slug']} – {pack['count']} prompt ({sample})")
    
    if len(packs) > 8:
        lines.append(f"... dan {len(packs) - 8} paket lainnya")
    
    lines.append("")
    lines.append("Ketik: lihat paket: [pack_slug] untuk lihat isi, atau pakai: [slug] untuk pakai satu prompt.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def list_all() -> dict:
    """List all prompts in database (compatible with v1 format)"""
    ensure_structure()
    result = {"total": 0, "by_category": {}}
    
    # Map v2 categories to v1 categories for compatibility
    category_map = {
        "Landing Page & Website": "DM",
        "Marketing & Ads": "DM", 
        "Content & Social Media": "CC",
        "Email & CRM": "DM",
        "Business & Offer / Tripwire": "BIZ",
        "Coding & Automation": "DEV"
    }
    
    for filename in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(filename, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Get category from filename
        category_name = None
        for cat, cat_file in CATEGORY_FILES.items():
            if cat_file == filename.name:
                category_name = cat
                break
        
        if not category_name:
            continue
        
        # Parse YAML blocks
        blocks = content.split("---\n")
        prompts = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip() or block.startswith("#"):
                continue
            
            try:
                yaml_data = yaml.safe_load(block)
                if not yaml_data:
                    continue
                
                # Map to v1 format
                v1_category = category_map.get(category_name, "PE")
                if v1_category not in result["by_category"]:
                    result["by_category"][v1_category] = []
                
                result["by_category"][v1_category].append({
                    "id": yaml_data.get("slug", "").upper().replace("-", "-"),
                    "title": yaml_data.get("title", ""),
                    "level": "⭐ Starter"
                })
                result["total"] += 1
            except:
                continue
    
    return result

def format_list_overview(data: dict) -> str:
    """Format list overview for display"""
    lines = [f"📊 Database Prompt: {data['total']} total"]
    
    for category, prompts in data["by_category"].items():
        lines.append(f"{category}: {len(prompts)} prompt")
        # Show first 3 prompts if any
        for i, prompt in enumerate(prompts[:3]):
            short_title = prompt["title"][:40] + "..." if len(prompt["title"]) > 40 else prompt["title"]
            lines.append(f"  {i+1}. {prompt['id']} – {short_title}")
        if len(prompts) > 3:
            lines.append(f"  ... dan {len(prompts) - 3} lainnya")
        lines.append("")
    
    lines.append("Gunakan: prompt [topik] untuk cari, atau List [kategori] untuk detail.")
    return "\n".join(lines)

def list_category(category_name: str) -> str:
    """List prompts in specific category"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    # Map v1 categories to v2 categories
    reverse_map = {
        "DM": ["Landing Page & Website", "Marketing & Ads", "Email & CRM"],
        "CC": ["Content & Social Media"],
        "BIZ": ["Business & Offer / Tripwire"],
        "DEV": ["Coding & Automation"],
        "PE": [],  # Not directly mapped in v2
        "OPS": []  # Not directly mapped in v2
    }
    
    v2_categories = reverse_map.get(category_name.upper(), [category_name])
    
    lines = [f"📂 Kategori {category_name}:"]

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Prompt Database Manager v2 - Support for Prompt Packs
"""

import os
import sys
import json
import re
import yaml
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

# Constants
PROMPTS_V2_DIR = Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "workspace" / "prompts_v2"

# Category keywords for auto-classification
CATEGORY_KEYWORDS = {
    "Landing Page & Website": ["landing page", "hero", "section", "wireframe", "layout", "above the fold", "website", "webpage"],
    "Marketing & Ads": ["ads", "iklan", "campaign", "creative", "conversion", "funnel", "marketing", "digital marketing"],
    "Content & Social Media": ["caption", "content", "reels", "tiktok", "thread", "script", "hook", "social media", "copywriting"],
    "Email & CRM": ["email", "newsletter", "sequence", "crm", "follow up", "mailing", "autoresponder"],
    "Business & Offer / Tripwire": ["offer", "tripwire", "pricing", "productized", "client", "business", "proposal", "freelance"],
    "Coding & Automation": ["code", "api", "script", "python", "deploy", "automation", "programming", "development"]
}

def ensure_structure():
    """Create prompts_v2 directory and initial category files"""
    PROMPTS_V2_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # Create initial category files if they don't exist
    for category in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.keys():
        file_name = category.replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_") + ".md"
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / file_name
        if not file_path.exists():
            with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"# {category} Prompts\n\n")
    
    # Set safe permissions
    os.chmod(PROMPTS_V2_DIR, 0o755)
    for file in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        os.chmod(file, 0o644)
    
    return True

def slugify(title: str) -> str:
    """Convert title to URL-friendly slug"""
    # Lowercase
    slug = title.lower()
    # Replace spaces and special characters with hyphens
    slug = re.sub(r'[^\w\s-]', '', slug)
    slug = re.sub(r'[-\s]+', '-', slug)
    # Remove leading/trailing hyphens
    slug = slug.strip('-')
    # Limit length
    return slug[:100]

def remove_prompt_by_slug(slug: str) -> bool:
    """Remove all YAML blocks with given slug from all category files"""
    removed = False
    slug = slug.lower()
    
    for file_path in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Split by YAML delimiters
        blocks = re.split(r'^---\s*$', content, flags=re.MULTILINE)
        new_blocks = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip():
                new_blocks.append(block)
                continue
            
            # Check if this block contains the slug
            if re.search(r'^slug:\s*' + re.escape(slug) + r'\s*$', block, re.MULTILINE | re.IGNORECASE):
                removed = True
                continue  # Skip this block (remove it)
            
            new_blocks.append(block)
        
        # Reconstruct content
        new_content = "---".join(new_blocks)
        
        # Write back if changed
        if new_content != content:
            with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(new_content)
    
    return removed

def auto_classify(prompt_text: str, title: str = "") -> str:
    """Auto-classify prompt into category based on keywords"""
    combined_text = (title + " " + prompt_text).lower()
    
    scores = {}
    for category, keywords in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.items():
        score = sum(1 for keyword in keywords if keyword in combined_text)
        scores[category] = score
    
    # Get category with highest score
    max_score = max(scores.values())
    if max_score == 0:
        return "Marketing & Ads"  # Default
    
    # Get all categories with max score
    top_categories = [cat for cat, score in scores.items() if score == max_score]
    
    # If tie, use first one (or could add tie-breaking logic)
    return top_categories[0]

def parse_yaml_blocks(content: str):
    """Parse YAML blocks from markdown file"""
    blocks = []
    pattern = r'^---\s*$(.*?)^---\s*$'
    
    for match in re.finditer(pattern, content, re.MULTILINE | re.DOTALL):
        yaml_content = match.group(1).strip()
        try:
            data = yaml.safe_load(yaml_content)
            if data:
                blocks.append(data)
        except:
            continue
    
    return blocks

def save_prompt(title: str, prompt_text: str, hint_category: str = None, pack_slug: str = None) -> dict:
    """Save single prompt to database"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    # Generate slug and remove any existing entry with same slug
    slug = slugify(title)
    remove_prompt_by_slug(slug)
    
    # Determine category
    if hint_category:
        category = hint_category
    else:
        category = auto_classify(prompt_text, title)
    
    # Generate tags from keywords
    tags = []
    for cat_keywords in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.values():
        for keyword in cat_keywords:
            if keyword in prompt_text.lower():
                tags.append(keyword)
    
    # Limit tags
    tags = list(set(tags))[:5]
    
    # Create YAML entry
    entry = {
        "title": title,
        "slug": slug,
        "category": category,
        "sub_category": "",  # Can be filled later
        "pack_slug": pack_slug,
        "tags": tags,
        "keywords": tags[:3],  # Top 3 tags as keywords
        "level": "starter",  # starter / advanced / expert
        "commercial": "public",  # public / private / template
        "created_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),
        "prompt": prompt_text,
        "notes": ""
    }
    
    # Determine file path
    file_name = category.replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_") + ".md"
    file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / file_name
    
    # Append to file
    yaml_content = yaml.dump(entry, allow_unicode=True, sort_keys=False)
    with open(file_path, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(f"\n---\n{yaml_content}---\n")
    
    return {
        "slug": slug,
        "title": title,
        "category": category,
        "pack_slug": pack_slug
    }

def parse_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> dict:
    """Parse prompt pack from raw text"""
    lines = raw_text.strip().split('\n')
    
    # First non-empty line is pack title
    pack_title = ""
    for line in lines:
        if line.strip():
            pack_title = line.strip()
            break
    
    # Find all sub-prompts (lines starting with number followed by ) or .
    sub_prompts = []
    current_title = ""
    current_content = []
    in_sub_prompt = False
    
    for line in lines:
        line = line.rstrip()
        
        # Check if this line starts a new sub-prompt
        match = re.match(r'^(\d+)[).]\s*(.+)$', line.strip())
        if match:
            # Save previous sub-prompt if exists
            if current_title and current_content:
                sub_prompts.append({
                    "title": current_title,
                    "prompt": "\n".join(current_content).strip()
                })
            
            # Start new sub-prompt
            current_title = match.group(2).strip()
            current_content = []
            in_sub_prompt = True
        elif in_sub_prompt and line.strip():
            current_content.append(line)
    
    # Don't forget the last sub-prompt
    if current_title and current_content:
        sub_prompts.append({
            "title": current_title,
            "prompt": "\n".join(current_content).strip()
        })
    
    return {
        "pack_title": pack_title,
        "pack_slug": slugify(pack_title),
        "sub_prompts": sub_prompts
    }

def save_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> list:
    """Save prompt pack to database"""
    pack_data = parse_prompt_pack(raw_text)
    
    # Determine category for the whole pack
    all_prompts_text = " ".join([sp["prompt"] for sp in pack_data["sub_prompts"]])
    pack_category = auto_classify(all_prompts_text, pack_data["pack_title"])
    
    results = []
    for i, sub_prompt in enumerate(pack_data["sub_prompts"]):
        # Create final title
        final_title = f"{pack_data['pack_title']} – {sub_prompt['title']}"
        
        # Generate slug for sub-prompt
        sub_slug = slugify(f"{pack_data['pack_slug']}-{sub_prompt['title']}")
        
        # Save the prompt
        result = save_prompt(
            title=final_title,
            prompt_text=sub_prompt["prompt"],
            hint_category=pack_category,
            pack_slug=pack_data["pack_slug"]
        )
        
        results.append(result)
    
    return results

def search_packs_by_topic(query: str) -> list:
    """Search for packs by topic/query"""
    query_lower = query.lower()
    pack_map = {}
    
    # Scan all category files
    for file_path in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        blocks = parse_yaml_blocks(content)
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.get("pack_slug"):
                continue
            
            # Check if this block matches the query
            search_text = (
                block.get("title", "") + " " +
                block.get("prompt", "") + " " +
                " ".join(block.get("tags", [])) + " " +
                " ".join(block.get("keywords", [])) + " " +
                block.get("category", "")
            ).lower()
            
            if query_lower in search_text:
                pack_slug = block["pack_slug"]
                if pack_slug not in pack_map:
                    pack_map[pack_slug] = {
                        "pack_slug": pack_slug,
                        "pack_title": block.get("title", "").split(" – ")[0] if " – " in block.get("title", "") else block.get("title", ""),
                        "category": block.get("category", ""),
                        "count": 0,
                        "sample_titles": []
                    }
                
                pack_map[pack_slug]["count"] += 1
                if len(pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"]) < 3:
                    short_title = block.get("title", "").split(" – ")[-1] if " – " in block.get("title", "") else block.get("title", "")[:30]
                    pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"].append(short_title)
    
    # Convert to list and sort by count (descending)
    packs = list(pack_map.values())
    packs.sort(key=lambda x: x["count"], reverse=True)
    
    return packs

def list_all() -> dict:
    """List all prompts in database"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    result = {"total": 0, "by_category": {}}
    
    for file_path in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        category = file_path.stem.replace("_", " ").replace("_", "/")
        
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        blocks = parse_yaml_blocks(content)
        result["by_category"][category] = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            result["by_category"][category].append({
                "slug": block.get("slug", ""),
                "title": block.get("title", "")[:50] + "..." if len(block.get("title", "")) > 50 else block.get("title", ""),
                "level": block.get("level", "starter")
            })
            result["total"] += 1
    
    return result

def format_prompt_packs(query: str, packs: list) -> str:
    """Format packs for display"""
    if not packs:
        return f"❌ Tidak ada paket prompt untuk '{query}'"
    
    lines = [f"🎯 Paket prompt {query} ({len(packs)}):"]
    
    for i, pack in enumerate(packs[:8]):  # Max 8 packs
        sample = ", ".join(pack["sample_titles"][:3])
        lines.append(f"{i+1}) {pack['pack_slug']} – {pack['count']} prompt ({sample})")
    
    if len(packs) > 8:
        lines.append(f"... dan {len(packs) - 8} paket lainnya")
    
    lines.append("Ketik: lihat paket: [pack_slug] untuk lihat isi, atau pakai: [slug] untuk pakai satu prompt.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def format_list_overview(data: dict) -> str:
    """Format list overview for display"""
    lines = [f"📊 Database Prompt: {data['total']} total"]
    
    for category, prompts in data["by_category"].items():
        if prompts:
            lines.append(f"• {category}: {len(prompts)} prompt")
    
    lines.append("\nKetik: List [kategori] untuk detail, atau prompt [topik] untuk cari.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def format_category_list(category: str, prompts: list) -> str:
    """Format category list for display"""
    if not prompts:
        return f"❌ Tidak ada prompt di kategori '{category}'"
    
    lines = [f"📁 {category} ({len(prompts)} prompt):"]
    
    for i, prompt in enumerate(prompts[:10]):  # Max 10 items
        lines.append(f"{i+1}) {prompt['slug']} – {prompt['title']}")
    
    if len(prompts) > 10:
        lines.append(f"... dan {len(prompts) - 10} prompt lainnya")
    
    lines.append("Ketik: pakai: [slug] untuk pakai prompt.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print(json.dumps({"error": "Usage: prompt_db_v2.py <command> [args]"}))
        sys.exit(1)
    
    command = sys.argv[1].lower()
    
    try:
        if command == "save":
            # Save single prompt: save "<title>" "<prompt_text>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 4:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing title or prompt text"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            title = sys.argv[2]
            prompt_text = " ".join(sys.argv[3:])
            result = save_prompt(title, prompt_text)
            print(json.dumps({"success": True, **result}))
        
        elif command == "save-pack":
            # Save prompt pack: save-pack "<raw_text>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 3:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing raw text"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            raw_text = " ".join(sys.argv[2:])
            results = save_prompt_pack(raw_text)
            
            # Format response
            if results:

{"path": "/root/.openclaw/scripts/prompt_db_v2.py", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Prompt Database Manager v2 - Support for Prompt Packs
"""

import os
import sys
import json
import re
import yaml
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

# Constants
PROMPTS_V2_DIR = Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "workspace" / "prompts_v2"

# Category keywords for auto-classification
CATEGORY_KEYWORDS = {
    "Landing Page & Website": ["landing page", "hero", "section", "wireframe", "layout", "above the fold", "website", "webpage"],
    "Marketing & Ads": ["ads", "iklan", "campaign", "creative", "conversion", "funnel", "marketing", "digital marketing"],
    "Content & Social Media": ["caption", "content", "reels", "tiktok", "thread", "script", "hook", "social media", "copywriting"],
    "Email & CRM": ["email", "newsletter", "sequence", "crm", "follow up", "mailing", "autoresponder"],
    "Business & Offer / Tripwire": ["offer", "tripwire", "pricing", "productized", "client", "business", "proposal", "freelance"],
    "Coding & Automation": ["code", "api", "script", "python", "deploy", "automation", "programming", "development"]
}

def ensure_structure():
    """Create prompts_v2 directory and initial category files"""
    PROMPTS_V2_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # Create initial category files if they don't exist
    for category in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.keys():
        file_name = category.replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_") + ".md"
        file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / file_name
        if not file_path.exists():
            with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"# {category} Prompts\n\n")
    
    # Set safe permissions
    os.chmod(PROMPTS_V2_DIR, 0o755)
    for file in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        os.chmod(file, 0o644)
    
    return True

def slugify(title: str) -> str:
    """Convert title to URL-friendly slug"""
    # Lowercase
    slug = title.lower()
    # Replace spaces and special characters with hyphens
    slug = re.sub(r'[^\w\s-]', '', slug)
    slug = re.sub(r'[-\s]+', '-', slug)
    # Remove leading/trailing hyphens
    slug = slug.strip('-')
    # Limit length
    return slug[:100]

def remove_prompt_by_slug(slug: str) -> bool:
    """Remove all YAML blocks with given slug from all category files"""
    removed = False
    slug = slug.lower()
    
    for file_path in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Split by YAML delimiters
        blocks = re.split(r'^---\s*$', content, flags=re.MULTILINE)
        new_blocks = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip():
                new_blocks.append(block)
                continue
            
            # Check if this block contains the slug
            if re.search(r'^slug:\s*' + re.escape(slug) + r'\s*$', block, re.MULTILINE | re.IGNORECASE):
                removed = True
                continue  # Skip this block (remove it)
            
            new_blocks.append(block)
        
        # Reconstruct content
        new_content = "---".join(new_blocks)
        
        # Write back if changed
        if new_content != content:
            with open(file_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(new_content)
    
    return removed

def auto_classify(prompt_text: str, title: str = "") -> str:
    """Auto-classify prompt into category based on keywords"""
    combined_text = (title + " " + prompt_text).lower()
    
    scores = {}
    for category, keywords in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.items():
        score = sum(1 for keyword in keywords if keyword in combined_text)
        scores[category] = score
    
    # Get category with highest score
    max_score = max(scores.values())
    if max_score == 0:
        return "Marketing & Ads"  # Default
    
    # Get all categories with max score
    top_categories = [cat for cat, score in scores.items() if score == max_score]
    
    # If tie, use first one (or could add tie-breaking logic)
    return top_categories[0]

def parse_yaml_blocks(content: str):
    """Parse YAML blocks from markdown file"""
    blocks = []
    pattern = r'^---\s*$(.*?)^---\s*$'
    
    for match in re.finditer(pattern, content, re.MULTILINE | re.DOTALL):
        yaml_content = match.group(1).strip()
        try:
            data = yaml.safe_load(yaml_content)
            if data:
                blocks.append(data)
        except:
            continue
    
    return blocks

def save_prompt(title: str, prompt_text: str, hint_category: str = None, pack_slug: str = None) -> dict:
    """Save single prompt to database"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    # Generate slug and remove any existing entry with same slug
    slug = slugify(title)
    remove_prompt_by_slug(slug)
    
    # Determine category
    if hint_category:
        category = hint_category
    else:
        category = auto_classify(prompt_text, title)
    
    # Generate tags from keywords
    tags = []
    for cat_keywords in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.values():
        for keyword in cat_keywords:
            if keyword in prompt_text.lower():
                tags.append(keyword)
    
    # Limit tags
    tags = list(set(tags))[:5]
    
    # Create YAML entry
    entry = {
        "title": title,
        "slug": slug,
        "category": category,
        "sub_category": "",  # Can be filled later
        "pack_slug": pack_slug,
        "tags": tags,
        "keywords": tags[:3],  # Top 3 tags as keywords
        "level": "starter",  # starter / advanced / expert
        "commercial": "public",  # public / private / template
        "created_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),
        "prompt": prompt_text,
        "notes": ""
    }
    
    # Determine file path
    file_name = category.replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_") + ".md"
    file_path = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / file_name
    
    # Append to file
    yaml_content = yaml.dump(entry, allow_unicode=True, sort_keys=False)
    with open(file_path, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(f"\n---\n{yaml_content}---\n")
    
    return {
        "slug": slug,
        "title": title,
        "category": category,
        "pack_slug": pack_slug
    }

def parse_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> dict:
    """Parse prompt pack from raw text"""
    lines = raw_text.strip().split('\n')
    
    # First non-empty line is pack title
    pack_title = ""
    for line in lines:
        if line.strip():
            pack_title = line.strip()
            break
    
    # Find all sub-prompts (lines starting with number followed by ) or .
    sub_prompts = []
    current_title = ""
    current_content = []
    in_sub_prompt = False
    
    for line in lines:
        line = line.rstrip()
        
        # Check if this line starts a new sub-prompt
        match = re.match(r'^(\d+)[).]\s*(.+)$', line.strip())
        if match:
            # Save previous sub-prompt if exists
            if current_title and current_content:
                sub_prompts.append({
                    "title": current_title,
                    "prompt": "\n".join(current_content).strip()
                })
            
            # Start new sub-prompt
            current_title = match.group(2).strip()
            current_content = []
            in_sub_prompt = True
        elif in_sub_prompt and line.strip():
            current_content.append(line)
    
    # Don't forget the last sub-prompt
    if current_title and current_content:
        sub_prompts.append({
            "title": current_title,
            "prompt": "\n".join(current_content).strip()
        })
    
    return {
        "pack_title": pack_title,
        "pack_slug": slugify(pack_title),
        "sub_prompts": sub_prompts
    }

def save_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> list:
    """Save prompt pack to database"""
    pack_data = parse_prompt_pack(raw_text)
    
    # Determine category for the whole pack
    all_prompts_text = " ".join([sp["prompt"] for sp in pack_data["sub_prompts"]])
    pack_category = auto_classify(all_prompts_text, pack_data["pack_title"])
    
    results = []
    for i, sub_prompt in enumerate(pack_data["sub_prompts"]):
        # Create final title
        final_title = f"{pack_data['pack_title']} – {sub_prompt['title']}"
        
        # Generate slug for sub-prompt
        sub_slug = slugify(f"{pack_data['pack_slug']}-{sub_prompt['title']}")
        
        # Save the prompt
        result = save_prompt(
            title=final_title,
            prompt_text=sub_prompt["prompt"],
            hint_category=pack_category,
            pack_slug=pack_data["pack_slug"]
        )
        
        results.append(result)
    
    return results

def search_packs_by_topic(query: str) -> list:
    """Search for packs by topic/query"""
    query_lower = query.lower()
    pack_map = {}
    
    # Scan all category files
    for file_path in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        blocks = parse_yaml_blocks(content)
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.get("pack_slug"):
                continue
            
            # Check if this block matches the query
            search_text = (
                block.get("title", "") + " " +
                block.get("prompt", "") + " " +
                " ".join(block.get("tags", [])) + " " +
                " ".join(block.get("keywords", [])) + " " +
                block.get("category", "")
            ).lower()
            
            if query_lower in search_text:
                pack_slug = block["pack_slug"]
                if pack_slug not in pack_map:
                    pack_map[pack_slug] = {
                        "pack_slug": pack_slug,
                        "pack_title": block.get("title", "").split(" – ")[0] if " – " in block.get("title", "") else block.get("title", ""),
                        "category": block.get("category", ""),
                        "count": 0,
                        "sample_titles": []
                    }
                
                pack_map[pack_slug]["count"] += 1
                if len(pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"]) < 3:
                    short_title = block.get("title", "").split(" – ")[-1] if " – " in block.get("title", "") else block.get("title", "")[:30]
                    pack_map[pack_slug]["sample_titles"].append(short_title)
    
    # Convert to list and sort by count (descending)
    packs = list(pack_map.values())
    packs.sort(key=lambda x: x["count"], reverse=True)
    
    return packs

def list_all() -> dict:
    """List all prompts in database"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    result = {"total": 0, "by_category": {}}
    
    for file_path in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        category = file_path.stem.replace("_", " ").replace("_", "/")
        
        with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        blocks = parse_yaml_blocks(content)
        result["by_category"][category] = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            result["by_category"][category].append({
                "slug": block.get("slug", ""),
                "title": block.get("title", "")[:50] + "..." if len(block.get("title", "")) > 50 else block.get("title", ""),
                "level": block.get("level", "starter")
            })
            result["total"] += 1
    
    return result

def format_prompt_packs(query: str, packs: list) -> str:
    """Format packs for display"""
    if not packs:
        return f"❌ Tidak ada paket prompt untuk '{query}'"
    
    lines = [f"🎯 Paket prompt {query} ({len(packs)}):"]
    
    for i, pack in enumerate(packs[:8]):  # Max 8 packs
        sample = ", ".join(pack["sample_titles"][:3])
        lines.append(f"{i+1}) {pack['pack_slug']} – {pack['count']} prompt ({sample})")
    
    if len(packs) > 8:
        lines.append(f"... dan {len(packs) - 8} paket lainnya")
    
    lines.append("Ketik: lihat paket: [pack_slug] untuk lihat isi, atau pakai: [slug] untuk pakai satu prompt.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def format_list_overview(data: dict) -> str:
    """Format list overview for display"""
    lines = [f"📊 Database Prompt: {data['total']} total"]
    
    for category, prompts in data["by_category"].items():
        if prompts:
            lines.append(f"• {category}: {len(prompts)} prompt")
    
    lines.append("\nKetik: List [kategori] untuk detail, atau prompt [topik] untuk cari.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def format_category_list(category: str, prompts: list) -> str:
    """Format category list for display"""
    if not prompts:
        return f"❌ Tidak ada prompt di kategori '{category}'"
    
    lines = [f"📁 {category} ({len(prompts)} prompt):"]
    
    for i, prompt in enumerate(prompts[:10]):  # Max 10 items
        lines.append(f"{i+1}) {prompt['slug']} – {prompt['title']}")
    
    if len(prompts) > 10:
        lines.append(f"... dan {len(prompts) - 10} prompt lainnya")
    
    lines.append("Ketik: pakai: [slug] untuk pakai prompt.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print(json.dumps({"error": "Usage: prompt_db_v2.py <command> [args]"}))
        sys.exit(1)
    
    command = sys.argv[1].lower()
    
    try:
        if command == "save":
            # Save single prompt: save "<title>" "<prompt_text>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 4:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing title or prompt text"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            title = sys.argv[2]
            prompt_text = " ".join(sys.argv[3:])
            result = save_prompt(title, prompt_text)
            print(json.dumps({"success": True, **result}))
        
        elif command == "save-pack":
            # Save prompt pack: save-pack "<raw_text>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 3:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing raw text"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            raw_text = " ".join(sys.argv[2:])
            results = save_prompt_pack(raw_text)
            
            # Format response
            if results:
                pack_slug = results[0]["pack_slug"]
                slugs = [r["slug"] for r in results]
                print(json.dumps({
                    "success": True,
                    "pack_slug": pack_slug,
                    "count": len(results),
                    "slugs": slugs[:7]  # Max 7 shown
                }))
            else:
                print(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": "No prompts found in pack"}))
        
        elif command == "search-packs":
            # Search packs: search-packs "<query>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 3:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing query"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            query = " ".join(sys.argv[2:])
            packs = search_packs_by_topic(query)
            output = format_prompt_packs(query, packs)
            print(output)

            # List all prompts
