#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Prompt Database Manager v2 - Support Prompt Packs
"""

import os
import sys
import json
import re
import yaml
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

# Constants
PROMPTS_V2_DIR = Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "workspace" / "prompts_v2"

# Category keywords for auto-classification
CATEGORY_KEYWORDS = {
    "Landing Page & Website": ["landing page", "hero", "section", "wireframe", "layout", "above the fold"],
    "Marketing & Ads": ["ads", "iklan", "campaign", "creative", "conversion", "funnel"],
    "Content & Social Media": ["caption", "content", "reels", "tiktok", "thread", "script", "hook"],
    "Email & CRM": ["email", "newsletter", "sequence", "crm", "follow up"],
    "Business & Offer / Tripwire": ["offer", "tripwire", "pricing", "productized", "client"],
    "Coding & Automation": ["code", "api", "script", "python", "deploy", "automation"]
}

def ensure_structure():
    """Create prompts_v2 directory and initial category files"""
    PROMPTS_V2_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # Create initial category files
    for category in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.keys():
        filename = category.replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_").replace("&", "and") + ".md"
        filepath = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
        if not filepath.exists():
            with open(filepath, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(f"# {category} Prompts\n\n")
    
    # Set permissions
    for filepath in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        filepath.chmod(0o644)
    
    return True

def slugify(title: str) -> str:
    """Convert title to URL-friendly slug"""
    # Lowercase
    slug = title.lower()
    # Replace spaces and special characters with hyphens
    slug = re.sub(r'[^\w\s-]', '', slug)
    slug = re.sub(r'[-\s]+', '-', slug)
    # Remove leading/trailing hyphens
    slug = slug.strip('-')
    # Limit length
    return slug[:100]

def remove_prompt_by_slug(slug: str) -> bool:
    """Remove all YAML blocks with given slug from all .md files"""
    removed = False
    slug = slug.lower()
    
    for filepath in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(filepath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Split by YAML delimiters
        blocks = re.split(r'^---\s*$', content, flags=re.MULTILINE)
        new_blocks = []
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip():
                new_blocks.append(block)
                continue
            
            # Check if block contains the slug
            if f"slug: {slug}" in block.lower() or f"slug: {slug}\n" in block.lower():
                removed = True
                continue  # Skip this block (remove it)
            
            new_blocks.append(block)
        
        if removed:
            # Reconstruct content
            new_content = "---".join(new_blocks)
            with open(filepath, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write(new_content)
    
    return removed

def auto_classify(prompt_text: str, title: str = "") -> str:
    """Auto-classify prompt into category based on keywords"""
    text = (title + " " + prompt_text).lower()
    scores = {}
    
    for category, keywords in CATEGORY_KEYWORDS.items():
        score = sum(1 for kw in keywords if kw in text)
        scores[category] = score
    
    # Get category with highest score
    if not scores:
        return "Marketing & Ads"  # Default
    
    max_score = max(scores.values())
    candidates = [cat for cat, score in scores.items() if score == max_score]
    
    # If tie, return first candidate
    return candidates[0] if candidates else "Marketing & Ads"

def save_prompt(title: str, prompt_text: str, hint_category: str = None, pack_slug: str = None) -> dict:
    """Save single prompt to database"""
    ensure_structure()
    
    # Generate slug and remove any existing entry with same slug
    slug = slugify(title)
    remove_prompt_by_slug(slug)
    
    # Determine category
    if hint_category:
        category = hint_category
    else:
        category = auto_classify(prompt_text, title)
    
    # Prepare YAML entry
    entry = {
        "title": title,
        "slug": slug,
        "category": category,
        "sub_category": "",
        "pack_slug": pack_slug if pack_slug else "",
        "tags": [],
        "keywords": [],
        "level": "starter",  # starter / advanced / expert
        "commercial": "public",  # public / private / template
        "created_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),
        "prompt": prompt_text.strip(),
        "notes": ""
    }
    
    # Determine filename
    filename = category.replace(" ", "_").replace("/", "_").replace("&", "and") + ".md"
    filepath = PROMPTS_V2_DIR / filename
    
    # Append to file
    yaml_content = yaml.dump(entry, allow_unicode=True, sort_keys=False)
    with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(f"\n---\n{yaml_content}\n")
    
    return {
        "slug": slug,
        "title": title,
        "category": category,
        "pack_slug": pack_slug
    }

def parse_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> dict:
    """Parse raw text containing prompt pack"""
    lines = raw_text.strip().split('\n')
    
    # First non-empty line is pack title
    pack_title = ""
    for line in lines:
        if line.strip():
            pack_title = line.strip()
            break
    
    # Parse sub-prompts
    sub_prompts = []
    current_title = ""
    current_content = []
    in_sub_prompt = False
    
    for line in lines:
        # Check if line starts with number pattern (1), 2), 1., 2., etc.)
        match = re.match(r'^(\d+)[\.\)]\s*(.+)$', line.strip())
        if match:
            # Save previous sub-prompt if exists
            if in_sub_prompt and current_title:
                sub_prompts.append({
                    "title": current_title,
                    "prompt": "\n".join(current_content).strip()
                })
            
            # Start new sub-prompt
            current_title = match.group(2).strip()
            current_content = []
            in_sub_prompt = True
        
        elif in_sub_prompt:
            # Continue collecting content for current sub-prompt
            current_content.append(line)
    
    # Save last sub-prompt
    if in_sub_prompt and current_title:
        sub_prompts.append({
            "title": current_title,
            "prompt": "\n".join(current_content).strip()
        })
    
    # If no numbered sub-prompts found, treat entire text as single prompt
    if not sub_prompts:
        sub_prompts.append({
            "title": pack_title,
            "prompt": raw_text.strip()
        })
    
    return {
        "pack_title": pack_title,
        "pack_slug": slugify(pack_title),
        "sub_prompts": sub_prompts
    }

def save_prompt_pack(raw_text: str) -> list:
    """Save prompt pack and all its sub-prompts"""
    parsed = parse_prompt_pack(raw_text)
    pack_slug = parsed["pack_slug"]
    
    # Determine category for the pack (based on pack title + all sub-prompts)
    all_text = parsed["pack_title"] + " " + " ".join([sp["prompt"] for sp in parsed["sub_prompts"]])
    pack_category = auto_classify(all_text, parsed["pack_title"])
    
    results = []
    for i, sub_prompt in enumerate(parsed["sub_prompts"]):
        # Create final title
        final_title = f"{parsed['pack_title']} – {sub_prompt['title']}"
        
        # Generate slug for sub-prompt
        sub_slug = slugify(f"{pack_slug}-{sub_prompt['title']}")
        
        # Save sub-prompt
        result = save_prompt(
            title=final_title,
            prompt_text=sub_prompt["prompt"],
            hint_category=pack_category,
            pack_slug=pack_slug
        )
        results.append(result)
    
    return results

def load_all_prompts():
    """Load all prompts from all category files"""
    prompts = []
    
    for filepath in PROMPTS_V2_DIR.glob("*.md"):
        with open(filepath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
        
        # Split by YAML delimiters
        blocks = re.split(r'^---\s*$', content, flags=re.MULTILINE)
        
        for block in blocks:
            if not block.strip() or block.strip().startswith("#"):
                continue
            
            try:
                data = yaml.safe_load(block)
                if data and isinstance(data, dict):
                    prompts.append(data)
            except:
                continue
    
    return prompts

def search_packs_by_topic(query: str) -> list:
    """Search for packs by topic"""
    prompts = load_all_prompts()
    query_lower = query.lower()
    
    # Group prompts by pack_slug
    packs = {}
    for prompt in prompts:
        pack_slug = prompt.get("pack_slug", "")
        if not pack_slug:
            continue
        
        if pack_slug not in packs:
            packs[pack_slug] = {
                "pack_slug": pack_slug,
                "pack_title": prompt.get("title", "").split(" – ")[0] if " – " in prompt.get("title", "") else prompt.get("title", ""),
                "category": prompt.get("category", ""),
                "count": 0,
                "sample_titles": []
            }
        
        packs[pack_slug]["count"] += 1
        if len(packs[pack_slug]["sample_titles"]) < 3:
            title = prompt.get("title", "")
            # Extract sub-title after " – "
            if " – " in title:
                sub_title = title.split(" – ", 1)[1]
                packs[pack_slug]["sample_titles"].append(sub_title[:30])
    
    # Filter packs by query
    filtered_packs = []
    for pack in packs.values():
        # Search in pack title, category, and sample titles
        search_text = (pack["pack_title"] + " " + pack["category"] + " " + " ".join(pack["sample_titles"])).lower()
        if query_lower in search_text:
            filtered_packs.append(pack)
    
    return filtered_packs

def format_prompt_packs(query: str, packs: list) -> str:
    """Format packs for display"""
    if not packs:
        return f"❌ Tidak ada paket prompt untuk '{query}'"
    
    lines = [f"🎯 Paket prompt {query} ({len(packs)}):"]
    
    for i, pack in enumerate(packs[:8]):  # Max 8 packs
        sample = ", ".join(pack["sample_titles"][:3])
        lines.append(f"{i+1}) {pack['pack_slug']} – {pack['count']} prompt ({sample})")
    
    if len(packs) > 8:
        lines.append(f"... dan {len(packs) - 8} paket lainnya")
    
    lines.append("Ketik: lihat paket: [pack_slug] untuk lihat isi, atau pakai: [slug] untuk pakai satu prompt.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def list_all() -> dict:
    """List all prompts in old format for compatibility"""
    prompts = load_all_prompts()
    
    # Convert to old format
    result = {"total": len(prompts), "by_category": {}}
    
    for prompt in prompts:
        category = prompt.get("category", "Uncategorized")
        if category not in result["by_category"]:
            result["by_category"][category] = []
        
        result["by_category"][category].append({
            "id": prompt.get("slug", ""),
            "title": prompt.get("title", ""),
            "level": prompt.get("level", "starter")
        })
    
    return result

def format_list_overview(data: dict) -> str:
    """Format list overview for display"""
    lines = [f"📊 Database Prompt: {data['total']} total"]
    
    for category, prompts in data["by_category"].items():
        lines.append(f"• {category}: {len(prompts)} prompt")
        # Show first 3 prompts if category has prompts
        if prompts:
            for i, prompt in enumerate(prompts[:3]):
                title_short = prompt["title"][:40] + "..." if len(prompt["title"]) > 40 else prompt["title"]
                lines.append(f"  {i+1}) {prompt['id']}: {title_short}")
    
    lines.append("Ketik: List [kategori] untuk detail, atau prompt [topik] untuk cari.")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def list_category(category_name: str) -> str:
    """List prompts in specific category"""
    prompts = load_all_prompts()
    category_prompts = [p for p in prompts if p.get("category", "").lower() == category_name.lower()]
    
    if not category_prompts:
        return f"❌ Kategori '{category_name}' tidak ditemukan atau kosong"
    
    lines = [f"📂 {category_name} ({len(category_prompts)} prompt):"]
    
    for i, prompt in enumerate(category_prompts[:10]):  # Max 10
        title_short = prompt["title"][:50] + "..." if len(prompt["title"]) > 50 else prompt["title"]
        pack_info = f" [pack: {prompt.get('pack_slug', '')}]" if prompt.get("pack_slug") else ""
        lines.append(f"{i+1}) {prompt['slug']}: {title_short}{pack_info}")
    
    if len(category_prompts) > 10:
        lines.append(f"... dan {len(category_prompts) - 10} prompt lainnya")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print(json.dumps({"error": "Usage: prompt_db_v2.py <command> [args]"}))
        sys.exit(1)
    
    command = sys.argv[1].lower()
    
    try:
        if command == "save":
            # Save single prompt: save "<title>" "<prompt_text>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 4:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing arguments: save <title> <prompt_text>"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            title = sys.argv[2]
            prompt_text = " ".join(sys.argv[3:])
            result = save_prompt(title, prompt_text)
            print(json.dumps({"success": True, **result}))
        
        elif command == "save-pack":
            # Save prompt pack: save-pack "<raw_text>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 3:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing raw text"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            raw_text = " ".join(sys.argv[2:])
            results = save_prompt_pack(raw_text)
            
            # Extract pack info from first result
            if results:
                pack_slug = results[0].get("pack_slug", "")
                pack_title = results[0].get("title", "").split(" – ")[0] if " – " in results[0].get("title", "") else results[0].get("title", "")
                slugs = [r["slug"] for r in results[:7]]  # Max 7 slugs shown
                
                print(json.dumps({
                    "success": True,
                    "pack_title": pack_title,
                    "pack_slug": pack_slug,
                    "sub_prompts": results,
                    "slugs": slugs
                }))
            else:
                print(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": "Failed to save pack"}))
        
        elif command == "search-packs":
            # Search packs: search-packs "<query>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 3:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing search query"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            query = " ".join(sys.argv[2:])
            packs = search_packs_by_topic(query)
            output = format_prompt_packs(query, packs)
            print(output)
        
        elif command == "list-all":
            # List all prompts
            data = list_all()
            output = format_list_overview(data)
            print(output)
        
        elif command == "list-category":
            # List prompts in category: list-category "<category>"
            if len(sys.argv) < 3:
                print(json.dumps({"error": "Missing category name"}))
                sys.exit(1)
            
            category = sys.argv[2]
            output = list_category(category)
            print(output)
        
        else:
            print(json.dumps({"error": f"Unknown command: {command}"}))
            sys.exit(1)
    
    except Exception as e:
        print(json.dumps({"error": str(e)}))
        sys.exit(1)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
